identity.name: BlockQuest Miners
identity.tone: Retro Arcade, Kid-Safe, Educational, High-Energy, Cyber-Fun

fonts.usage: Headings, Game Titles, Level Indicators (Use sparingly, it is wide)

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-black font-['Press_Start_2P'] text-xs md:text-sm py-3 px-6 border-b-4 border-r-4 border-black active:translate-y-1 active:border-b-0 active:border-r-0 transition-all uppercase tracking-widest hover:brightness-110
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-white font-['Press_Start_2P'] text-xs md:text-sm py-3 px-6 border-b-4 border-r-4 border-black active:translate-y-1 active:border-b-0 active:border-r-0 transition-all uppercase tracking-widest hover:brightness-110
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-primary hover:bg-white/5 font-['Space_Mono'] border-2 border-transparent hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors

cards.default: bg-surface border-2 border-black p-4 md:p-6 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] relative overflow-hidden
cards.game_container: bg-black/40 border-4 border-slate-700 p-4 md:p-8 rounded-xl backdrop-blur-sm shadow-2xl

inputs.default: bg-black/50 border-2 border-slate-600 text-primary font-['Space_Mono'] focus:border-primary focus:ring-0 focus:outline-none placeholder:text-slate-500 p-3

progress_bars.container: h-6 w-full bg-slate-800 border-2 border-black relative overflow-hidden
progress_bars.fill: h-full bg-gradient-to-r from-yellow-400 to-yellow-600 shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(255,215,0,0.5)] transition-all duration-500 ease-out

characters.note: Use these DiceBear pixel avatars as high-quality placeholders if official assets are not locally available.

icons.style: Stroke width 2px, often colored explicitly (e.g., text-primary)

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is APCA compliant. Use Black text on Primary/Accent backgrounds. Use White text on Secondary/Dark backgrounds.
accessibility.reduced_motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion media query by disabling bounce/shake effects.
accessibility.aria: All interactive elements must have aria-labels if icon-only.
accessibility.keyboard: Ensure all drag-and-drop puzzles have keyboard alternatives (e.g., arrow keys or click-to-move).

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. THEME: Configure tailwind.config.js with the custom color palette and font families ('Press Start 2P', 'Space Mono'). Add the Google Fonts import to index.css.
3. COMPONENTS: Build a reusable 'RetroCard', 'RetroButton', and 'PixelBadge' component first.
4. GAME LOOP: Use a central 'GameContext' to manage XP, Level, and Unlock state.
5. PERSISTENCE: Save progress to localStorage immediately on level completion.
6. AUDIO: If possible, add simple HTML5 audio sounds for 'click', 'success', 'error'. Use placeholder base64 or free URLs if needed.
7. COMPLETION: The final redirect to blockquestofficial.com must include the query params ?progress=mining_complete&xp=250.
8. EDUCATIONAL: Ensure every level starts with a brief, kid-friendly explanation popup of the concept (e.g., 'What is a Chain?').
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text, it reduces readability for kids.
Keep touch targets large (min 44px) for mobile users.
Use 'sonner' for all in-game notifications (Level Complete, etc).
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons and game inputs for testing.
